# Requirements Quality Checklist: AI Core Reflection MVP

**Purpose**: Validate the quality, clarity, completeness, and consistency of requirements in the spec, plan, and data-model documents before implementation begins.
**Created**: 2026-05-22
**Feature**: [spec.md](spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command. Each item tests the REQUIREMENTS THEMSELVES, not the implementation.

---

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are retry count and backoff parameters explicitly specified in functional requirements? [Gap, Spec §FR — "retry" only in Edge Cases, not in requirements]
- [ ] CHK002 Are timeout requirements specified for AI provider calls at the Core level? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases mentions "exceeds acceptable latency" but no hard timeout]
- [ ] CHK003 Is the repair pipeline (invalid JSON → repair → revalidate → fallback → fail) specified as a functional requirement? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases mentions "must not return malformed payloads" but no repair pipeline requirement]
- [ ] CHK004 Are x-request-id propagation requirements specified? [Gap, plan.md adds this but spec.md has no requirement for it]
- [ ] CHK005 Are observability/logging requirements specified (latency, model used, retry count, parse failures)? [Gap, plan.md adds observability but spec.md has no requirement]
- [ ] CHK006 Are content filtering requirements for offensive/unsafe stories specified or explicitly excluded? [Gap, Spec §Edge Cases says "Documented for future content filtering; MVP may pass through with prompt guardrails only" — not in FR list]
- [ ] CHK007 Are performance requirements (p95 < 7s for question batch) specified in the FR section? [Gap, plan.md defines it but spec.md success criteria SC-003 mentions timing indirectly]
- [ ] CHK008 Are minimum content length requirements specified for bias item fields (explanation, storyConnection, alternativePerspective)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-006 says "meaningful minimum content length" — "meaningful" is not quantified]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK009 Is "meaningful minimum content length" in FR-006 quantified with specific character counts? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006 — "meaningful" is ambiguous, needs min chars]
- [ ] CHK010 Is "meaningful minimum length" for reflectionPrompt in FR-007 quantified? [Clarity, Spec §FR-007 — same ambiguity as FR-006]
- [ ] CHK011 Is "contextual" in FR-002 defined with specific criteria (e.g., must reference story details)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002 — "contextual follow-up questions" is not defined]
- [ ] CHK012 Is "non-clinical" in FR-010 defined with examples of prohibited and acceptable phrasing? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010 — "must not emit clinical diagnoses" is clear, but "non-clinical" framing for assessment wording needs examples]
- [ ] CHK013 Is "story-specific" in SC-005 defined with measurable criteria for evaluation? [Clarity, Spec §SC-005 — "90% of sampled assessment outputs include story-specific references" is measurable, but "story-specific" could be defined]
- [ ] CHK014 Is "valid structured JSON" in FR-008 defined with the exact schema contract reference? [Clarity, Spec §FR-008 — references "agreed public integration contract" but should cite contracts.ts]
- [ ] CHK015 Is "provider failure" in error responses defined (network error vs 5xx vs timeout vs malformed response)? [Clarity, Spec §Edge Cases — "AI provider fails mid-request" covers one case but not all]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK016 Does the API.md contract match the spec.md FR-002 (2–5 questions) and data-model.md schema? [Consistency, cross-document check]
- [ ] CHK017 Does data-model.md BiasItem "name min 1" align with spec FR-006 requirement for meaningful content? [Consistency, data-model says min 1 char, spec says "meaningful" — these conflict]
- [ ] CHK018 Does the "no maximum" bias count in FR-005 align with the statement "MVP may return more than one bias" in acceptance scenarios? [Consistency, one says "no maximum", scenario says "may return more than one" — consistent but worth confirming]
- [ ] CHK019 Do the story length validation requirements match between spec (50–3000 in FR-001) and data-model.md (50–3000 in GenerateQuestionRequest)? [Consistency, verify alignment]
- [ ] CHK020 Does the plan.md "No OpenAPI generation in MVP" decision conflict with any spec requirement? [Consistency, spec FR-008 says "structured JSON matching the agreed public integration contract" — Zod alone satisfies this]
- [ ] CHK021 Do the risk table ("~30 biases may miss edge cases") and the spec assumption ("Content filtering before AI processing may be added in a later feature") align on MVP scope boundaries? [Consistency, scope boundary between plans]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK022 Can acceptance scenario 4 in US1 ("invalid or missing story") be objectively verified without test data examples? [Measurability, Spec §US1-AS4 — "rejects with clear validation outcome" is testable but "clear" is subjective]
- [ ] CHK023 Is the "99% parse success" in SC-001 and SC-002 defined with a sample size or confidence interval? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001/002 — measurable but sample size matters for confidence]
- [ ] CHK024 Can "E2E reflection journey completes without exposing secrets" in SC-007 be verified in CI? [Measurability, Spec §SC-007 — requires automated secret scanning or manual review]
- [ ] CHK025 Is the "90% story-reference heuristic" in SC-005 defined with evaluation criteria (what counts as a "story-specific reference")? [Measurability, Spec §SC-005 — needs operational definition for automated eval]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK026 Are recovery flow requirements specified for the case where the AI provider returns 502 continuously (exhausted retries)? [Coverage, Spec §Edge Cases mentions retry but not what happens after]
- [ ] CHK027 Are requirements specified for empty Q&A lists in assessment request (0 questions, 0 answers)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-004 says "questions array and answers array" but data-model says "Min 1" — validation boundary]
- [ ] CHK028 Are requirements specified for mismatched questions/answers array lengths in assessment? [Coverage, data-model.md says "validated in orchestrator" but spec doesn't mention this case]
- [ ] CHK029 Are requirements specified for maximum story length exceeding 3000 chars via HTTP (body too large)? [Coverage, Spec §FR-001 covers validation but not HTTP-level limits]
- [ ] CHK030 Are requirements specified for concurrent duplicate requests for the same sessionId? [Coverage, Gap — Core is stateless but public backend could send duplicates]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK031 Is the behavior specified when the bias catalog JSON file is missing or malformed at startup? [Edge Case, Gap — catalog is loaded from filesystem]
- [ ] CHK032 Is the behavior specified when environment variables are missing or invalid? [Edge Case, plan.md says "env loader with Zod validation" but spec doesn't require it]
- [ ] CHK033 Is the behavior specified for extremely long question batches (e.g., 3000-char stories that produce max 5 long questions)? [Edge Case, Spec §US1-AS3 covers "no truncation errors" but not partial output]
- [ ] CHK034 Is the behavior specified when Gemini returns a non-JSON response that cannot be repaired? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases says "failed parses trigger retry or error paths" but repair pipeline is in plan.md]
- [ ] CHK035 Is the behavior specified when the Gemini API key is invalid or expired? [Edge Case, Gap — auth middleware covers Core API key but not provider key]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK036 Are latency/SLA requirements specified for the assessment endpoint (not just question endpoint)? [NFR, Spec §FR-006 covers question 5s but assessment latency is unspecified]
- [ ] CHK037 Are rate-limiting requirements specified for Core endpoints? [NFR, Gap — "monitor RPD" in plan.md risks but no requirement]
- [ ] CHK038 Are dependency requirements specified for Node.js and TypeScript versions? [NFR, plan.md says "TypeScript 5.x strict, Node 22 LTS" but spec doesn't — this is fine in plan.md]
- [ ] CHK039 Are security requirements specified beyond bearer token auth (e.g., CORS, request size limits, Content-Type enforcement)? [NFR, Spec §FR-009 covers auth but not other security boundaries]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK040 Is the assumption that "English is the primary language for MVP stories and outputs" validated against target user base? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK041 Is the assumption that "Provider selection, rate limits, and cost controls are decided inside the private Core repository" sufficient for MVP launch without cost exposure? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions]
- [ ] CHK042 Is the assumption that "Content filtering before AI processing may be added in a later feature" acceptable given potential legal/ethical risks? [Assumption, Spec §Assumptions + Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK043 Is the dependency on Gemini Flash documented as a single-provider risk (no fallback provider in MVP)? [Dependency, plan.md mentions "Gemini Flash only for MVP" but not in spec requirements]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK044 Spec §Success Criteria SC-003 says "Question batches always contain between 2 and 5 questions when Core returns success" — this conflicts with the repair pipeline possibility of returning fewer after fallback? [Ambiguity, if fallback succeeds but with fewer questions]
- [ ] CHK045 Spec §FR-012 "Core MUST remain stateless per request" — does x-request-id generation constitute state? [Ambiguity, request-id is per-request metadata, not session state]

---

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- All 45 items (CHK001–CHK045) test REQUIREMENTS QUALITY, not implementation correctness
- Items reference spec.md (`Spec §`), plan.md, or data-model.md where applicable
- `[Gap]` markers identify missing requirements that should be added or explicitly deferred
- Resolve ambiguities and gaps before Phase 1 implementation begins
